messages.content: PLACEHOLDER — will be overridden by current supervisor prompt
Добавь JWT аутентификацию для gRPC interceptor. Нужен middleware который проверяет токен из metadata и отклоняет неавторизованные запросы. Нужны unit тесты.
messages.content_preview: Добавь JWT аутентификацию для gRPC interceptor...

tool_calls.name: manage_tasks
tool_calls.arguments:
{"action": "create", "title": "Add JWT authentication gRPC interceptor", "description": "Type: User Story
Goal: Add JWT authentication as gRPC unary interceptor.
Context: Existing interceptors in internal/delivery/grpc/interceptors.go (currently only LoggingInterceptor). Follow same pattern for AuthInterceptor.
Acceptance Criteria:
  - Interceptor extracts JWT from gRPC metadata 'authorization' header
  - Invalid/missing token returns codes.Unauthenticated
  - Valid token extracts user claims and adds to context
  - Unit tests cover valid, invalid, and missing token scenarios
Constraints: Use golang-jwt/jwt/v5. Don't modify existing LoggingInterceptor.", "acceptance_criteria": ["JWT validation works", "Unauthenticated for bad tokens", "Unit tests pass"]}

messages.content: Task task_sq_001 created and approved by user. You can now start it and create subtasks.
